A.label: Volume revival
A.description: Older project, volume has picked up recently
A.body:
Hey $TEAM_OR_NAME, quick question.
Saw $$TICKER pushing good volume lately.
Are you guys handling volume and building your treasury manually, or working with a market maker?

B.label: Held the floor
B.description: Newer project that dumped from ATH but hasn't been rugged, still above 70k mcap
B.body:
Hey $TEAM_OR_NAME, $$TICKER has been holding its floor better than most projects its size right now.
You guys running that in-house or have a MM behind it?

C.label: Up only
C.description: New chart, mostly up only, no significant dumps
C.body:
Hey $TEAM_OR_NAME, $$TICKER chart looks clean, not a lot of dumps for a project at this stage.
Are you guys managing that yourselves or working with a MM?

rules.label: held the floor after ATH dump
